# Server

> **Namespace:** `DeadworksManaged.Api`

Server-side utilities for sending commands to player clients.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `ClientCommand(int arg0, string arg1)` | Sends a console command to the client in the given slot (e.g. "echo hello", "playgamesound ..."). |
